string.text: Uwaaahhh~ You scared me, I had nooooo idea you were there, Commander~ Hm? That was too fake? Haha, sorry about that, I'll try to be more convincing next time.
Good to see you again, Leva.
Hm? What is it? Did you want to see my face again?
Leva, what do you think about Klukai?
Everytime I see Klukai working hard, I can't help but want to bully her a little... Ah, you don't have to keep that a secret, Commander.
We'll soon be in a closer partnership than ever before~ Aren't you looking forward to it, Commander~?
Okay Leva, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
Commander, once the dust settles, shall we relax and enjoy our time together? That's a promise, okay? No take-backs.
